content.en:
"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, I didn't expect the ordinary half-step Domain Ancestor in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain to be so powerful, I lost. "

Eternal Dao Ancestor said discouragedly.

He deliberately chose an ordinary half-step domain ancestor who cultivated to be ordinary as an opponent, thinking that he could easily win the points in this game, but he didn't expect that it was just a counterpart, and the opponent would kill him in two moves!

Among the ordinary half-step domain ancestors from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, his strength is considered to be top-notch, and when he fights with ordinary half-step domain ancestors, even if he loses, he will not lose so badly, at least he has the strength to fight back.

However, when facing the ordinary half-step domain ancestor from the depths of the dark forbidden realm before, it was as if he was facing a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm!

Now.

Eternal Dao Ancestor couldn't help but rejoice.

Fortunately, he met this ordinary half-step domain ancestor from the depths of the dark forbidden realm in the Battle Realm Tower, even if he died, it was not real death, if he met this ordinary half-step domain ancestor outside the Battle Realm Tower, it would really be a fall.

"After all, the resources of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm are still too scarce, and the inheritance is relatively weak and the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm are not comparable at all, the next time you choose an opponent, you will observe it first and then decide to challenge. "

Ye Tian said.

After all, the purpose of entering the Battle Tower this time is to win the challenge to earn points, so as to exchange them for precious inheritance or resources in the Battle Tower.

It is necessary to pick a slightly weaker opponent.

And how to observe the strength of the opponent can be seen from the opponent's record.

If the Black Tower Mark chooses the challenge of a certain half-step domain ancestor, you can observe the opponent's record first, and if it wins often, then the strength must be very strong.

The Eternal Dao Ancestor agreed with Ye Tian's point of view, and even if he seriously watched the opponent's record on the Black Tower Imprint one by one, he would select the opponent.

Suddenly!

Ye Tian saw a familiar figure on the fighting platform again.

Jinchen Daozu also accepted a challenge at this moment! And the other party also agreed to Jinchen Daozu's challenge!

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor was a half-step domain ancestor of the Returning Realm! The opponent he accepted for challenge was also a half-step Domain Ancestor of the Returning Realm!

On the fighting platform of the Battle Realm Tower, so far, most of them are ordinary half-step domain ancestors and half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm who have come down to challenge, and there are very few half-step domain ancestors who have returned to the One Realm!

Now, the two half-step domain ancestors of the One Realm were standing on the fighting platform, immediately attracting the attention of many onlookers.

"I am the Blood Yang Dao Ancestor of Tianyu City, I don't know where Your Excellency comes from?"

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor's opponent asked, although the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain could be said to be in the tens of thousands, but he didn't have the slightest impression of Jin Chen Dao Ancestor's character, it was obvious that he was from somewhere else.

In the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm!

Jin Chen Daozu's eyes immediately became cautious.

"Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm!"

Jin Chen Daozu snorted coldly and took the lead in attacking.

Since he already knew that the opponent was a person from the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, Jinchen Daozu did not dare to leave a back hand, and his attack was a killing move. After all, after some observation, he had already profoundly realized that the strength of the half-step domain ancestors in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain was much higher than that of their Xuanxuan to the Ancient Realm.

And he was just a half-step domain ancestor who had just broken through to the Returning One Realm.

Even if the other party had just broken through to the realm of the Returning One Realm and a half-step domain ancestor, Jinchen Dao Ancestor did not dare to take it lightly.

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor immediately cast a defensive forbidden dao technique, and urged the offensive forbidden dao technique with all his cultivation.

"Hmph, Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, I haven't heard of it, it seems that it's just a small place with no name, even if I cultivate to the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, my strength is far inferior to mine!"

The Blood Yang Dao Ancestor snorted coldly, even if he cast the Thunder Forbidden Dao Technique!

When the Blood Yang Dao Ancestor performed the Thunder Forbidden Dao Technique, the entire battle arena immediately made a violent wind and thunder, lightning and thunder! A Thunder Forbidden Creature suddenly appeared, controlling the whole field!

"Boom!!"

The entire battle arena is filled with thunder and lightning containing forbidden power!

Subsequently, these thunderbolts converged and slashed towards Jinchen Dao Ancestor!

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor's face changed drastically! From the forbidden power that had been slashed, he sensed a threat that he had never felt before!

And when Jin Chen Daozu's forbidden power slashed at the opponent, the opponent's thunder and lightning forbidden power had already slashed in front of him!

"Buzz!!"

A buzzing sound fell, and Jin Chen Daozu's body was directly hit by the forbidden power of the thunder system, and his body continued to crack, and the injury was not light!

However, the forbidden Dao technique performed by Jinchen Dao Ancestor was also slashed in front of the opponent at this moment!

"Bang !!"

The Blood Yang Dao Ancestor's defensive forbidden Dao technique cracked! But it didn't shatter! The forbidden body also canceled out some of the aftermath!

So he was barely injured!

The two kept fighting, and Jinchen Daozu was completely crushed, and he couldn't fight back at all.

After a while, Jin Chen Daozu's body cracked, and he was judged to be defeated, so he moved out directly.

Sometimes, the battle between the half-step domain ancestors takes a long time, and there are no longer a few who have fought for tens of thousands of years.

But the War Realm Tower can't let you fight for that long, so once the flesh is shattered, or after a month of fighting, the winner will be decided.

At this time, Jinchen Daozu's body was shattered, and this challenge of Jinchen Daozu ended in failure!

Fortunately, in this challenge, Jinchen Daozu did not choose a 100-point challenge, but found a challenge with 50 points as a reward, so he only lost 50 points.

Under the effect of the Battle Realm Tower, Jinchen Dao Ancestor's body condensed again!

However, losing 50 points in a battle, Jinchen Daozu is also very painful!

The battle between Jinchen Dao Ancestor and the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor from the depths of the dark taboo seemed to be the prelude to the battle of the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and next, there were many Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors who came to challenge!

Of course, Ye Tian could also see that most of these half-step domain ancestors of the Returning One Realm had just broken through to the realm of the Returning One Realm half-step domain ancestors.

Some veteran Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors are estimated to be roughly aware of the strength of other people, so they will not end easily, and no one will accept the challenge of those powerful Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

After all, points are not cabbage, and no one will give them to others easily.

And most of the challenges in the Fighting Arena ended with the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor from the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm winning points!

From this point of view, the half-step domain ancestor of the same level, the half-step domain ancestor from the Xuan Xuan to the Ancient Realm, is not the opponent of the half-step domain ancestor in the depths of the dark forbidden at all!

The gap between the two is too big!

From this, it can also make people more aware of the prosperity and mystery in the depths of the dark taboo!
